feature_name: Passing Query Results to a Script
sql_array: CREATE TABLE hackernews (id UInt64, comment String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO hackernews (id, comment) VALUES (1, 'This is a test comment'), (2, 'Another comment for testing');
SELECT * FROM executable('sentiment.py', TabSeparated, 'id UInt64, sentiment Float32', (SELECT id, comment FROM hackernews WHERE id > 0));
UPDATE hackernews SET comment = 'Updated comment' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM executable('sentiment.py', TabSeparated, 'id UInt64, sentiment Float32', (SELECT id, comment FROM hackernews WHERE comment != ''));
